title: evolvulus ovatus
intro: Evolvulus ovatus, also known as dwarf blue daze, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and its herbal preparations can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that support immune function and promote relaxation. Evolvulus ovatus is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like fever, sore throats, and skin irritations.
